title: rubus × recticuspis
intro: Rubus × recticuspis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which is attributed to its rich polyphenol composition. The health benefits of Rubus × recticuspis include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant's fruits, leaves, and roots are used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
